title: Spicy Indian Rigatoni Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on a classic pasta dish, combining the best of Indian and Italian cuisines. This recipe is quick, easy, and packed with nutrients.
instructions: Cook the rigatoni according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the chopped tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cayenne pepper (if using).
Add the cooked rigatoni to the skillet and stir in the stir fry sauce.
Combine everything well and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
